entities.name: DURUM WHEAT
entities.description: Azerbaijani durum wheat (Triticum durum Desf.) genotypes used in the study

entities.name: SSR MARKERS
entities.description: Simple sequence repeats used for genetic diversity analysis and linked to drought response

entities.name: AZERBAIJAN
entities.description: The country from which the durum wheat accessions were collected

entities.name: GWM 335
entities.description: An SSR locus on chromosome 5B showing 5 alleles

entities.name: GWM 445
entities.description: An SSR locus on chromosome 2A showing 4 alleles

entities.name: GWM 617
entities.description: An SSR locus showing only 1 allele

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variation of genetic characteristics among the 45 durum wheat genotypes

entities.name: UPGMA
entities.description: Unweighted Pair Group Method with Arithmetic Mean used to reveal major clusters in the genetic structure

entities.name: NEI GENETIC DISTANCE INDEX
entities.description: A method used to calculate genetic distance for the UPGMA dendrogram

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of wheat genotypes to respond positively to drought conditions

entities.name: HARSH CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environmental stressors that farmers deal with, affecting wheat productivity

entities.name: WHEAT PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The overall yield and output of wheat crops

entities.name: PIC VALUE
entities.description: Polymorphism Information Content used to evaluate the diversity of SSR markers
